deploy.startCommand: bash -c 'set -e; mkdir -p /app/data/sqlite /app/data/chroma_db /app/logs; if [ ! -s /app/data/sqlite/lpm.db ]; then echo "[init] creating SQLite db"; sqlite3 /app/data/sqlite/lpm.db ".read /app/docker/sqlite/init.sql"; fi; if [ ! -d /app/data/chroma_db/documents ] || [ ! -d /app/data/chroma_db/document_chunks ]; then echo "[init] initializing ChromaDB"; python /app/docker/app/init_chroma.py; fi; echo "[start] launching flask on port ${PORT:-8002}"; cd /app && exec python -m flask run --host=0.0.0.0 --port=${PORT:-8002}'
